findings.section: Description / What to do / Acceptance Criteria / Post-completion
findings.issue: Task 7 body is written almost entirely in Russian (Description, What to do, TDD Anchor header, AC, Verification Steps user section, Post-completion). Tasks 6, 8, 9, 10 are in English. Inconsistent language breaks the standard template and makes the task harder for English-language agents to execute.
findings.fix: Translate Description, What to do, Acceptance Criteria, Verification Steps (User), and Post-completion to English. Keep only the bilingual string list in DynamicForm (that is code content, not task prose). Required Skills header 'Перед выполнением задачи загрузи:' should also be 'Before executing this task, load:' (as in Tasks 6, 8, 9).

findings.issue: Required Skills header reads 'Перед выполнением задачи загрузи:' (Russian) while the rest of the task and all other batch-2 tasks use 'Before executing this task, load:' (English). Minor but inconsistent.
findings.fix: Replace 'Перед выполнением задачи загрузи:' with 'Before executing this task, load:' to match Tasks 6, 9, 10.

findings.issue: Required Skills header reads 'Перед выполнением задачи загрузи:' (Russian). Post-completion checklist items are in Russian. All other prose in Task 9 is English.
findings.fix: Replace Russian header with 'Before executing this task, load:'. Translate Post-completion checklist to English: 'Record a brief report in decisions.md (Summary: 1-3 sentences, review links, no findings tables)' / 'If deviated from spec — describe the deviation and reason' / 'Update user-spec/tech-spec if anything changed'.

findings.issue: Frontmatter contains inline comments on every field (e.g. '# planned -> in_progress -> done', '# номера задач-зависимостей', '# МАССИВ скиллов для загрузки'). No other task in this batch or the first batch retains these scaffolding comments. They indicate the task was generated from a raw template without cleanup.
findings.fix: Remove all inline comments from the frontmatter. Final frontmatter should have bare values only, matching the style of Tasks 6, 7, 8, 10.

findings.issue: Frontmatter has 'verify: []' (empty) but the task includes a 'Smoke' verification section with concrete checks. The verify field should reflect actual verification types present in the task.
findings.fix: Change 'verify: []' to 'verify: [smoke]' to accurately reflect that smoke verification is defined in the Verification Steps section.

findings.issue: Context Files does not include decisions.md, while Tasks 8 and 9 (which have comparable complexity and also describe deviations) do include it. Task 7 makes architectural choices (StatusChanger prop API: add submissionId or generic apiPath) that benefit from reading decisions.md.
findings.fix: Add '- [decisions.md](../decisions.md)' to the Context Files list, consistent with Tasks 8 and 9.

findings.issue: Context Files is missing two template admin pages that the tech-spec explicitly lists for Task 10 to audit: 'src/app/(dashboard)/templates/new/page.tsx' and 'src/app/(dashboard)/templates/[id]/edit/page.tsx'. These files are created in Task 5 (templates admin pages) and are part of the feature's admin UI that should be reviewed.
findings.fix:
Add the following to Context Files:
- [src/app/(dashboard)/templates/new/page.tsx](../../../src/app/(dashboard)/templates/new/page.tsx)
- [src/app/(dashboard)/templates/[id]/edit/page.tsx](../../../src/app/(dashboard)/templates/[id]/edit/page.tsx)

findings.issue: user-spec.md is absent from Context Files. The standard template requires it as a baseline reference, and all code-writing tasks in this batch include it. An audit task should also be able to cross-reference user requirements.
findings.fix: Add '- [user-spec.md](../user-spec.md)' as the first entry in Context Files, consistent with Tasks 6, 7, 8, 9.

findings.issue: TDD Anchor explains no tests are needed ('pure UI wiring task with no logic to isolate'). This is acceptable per the template — when a code-writing task genuinely has no testable logic, a present TDD Anchor section explaining the omission is valid. No action required.
findings.fix: No fix needed. The section is present and the justification is clear.

findings.issue: Tech-spec testing strategy calls out 'Submit — rate-limit: 6th request from same IP+templateId within window returns 429' as a unit-test case, and the tech-spec Submit endpoint is Task 3's responsibility. Task 8 covers the frontend 429 response ('show user-friendly message in both EN and RU') in Edge Cases (Details) but does not include an explicit AC for it. The AC reads 'localStorage errors are silently ignored' and other frontend concerns but omits the 429 display path.
findings.fix: Consider adding an AC: '[ ] On 429 response from submit endpoint, an EN/RU rate-limit message is shown and the Submit button is re-enabled'. Low priority since it is documented in Edge Cases.
